# Dominic Martineau

> Full stack developer and Director of Technology and Digital Strategy at Optania, building AI solutions for education and mental health.

Dominic Martineau is a software developer based in Quebec, Canada. He is the Director of Technology and
Digital Strategy at Optania, a company that develops AI-powered solutions for education and mental health.
He previously worked as a team lead
at Canoë, where he built platforms such as RéseauContact, EspaceCanoë, and La Toile du Québec.

He is also known online as "akanoxx".

## Optania

Optania builds caring AI solutions for education and mental health. Its products include:

- **Psylio** (https://www.psylio.com) — Practice management software for mental health professionals
- **Jade** (https://jade.psylio.com) — Directory to find mental health professionals
- **EVIO** (https://www.optania.com/evio) — Digital education platform for students

## Side Projects

- **Bonjour Metal** (https://bonjourmetal.com) — Heavy metal music discovery platform
- **Apostasie moi !** (https://apostasie.me) — Step-by-step guide to apostasy in French
- **Porcom** (https://porcom.tumblr.com) — Personal movie journal
